session.user: Run `uv run pytest tests/commands/launch/ -x -v` and report the results. Do NOT modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command to execute the tests in the `tests/commands/launch/` directory.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on launch command tests with verbose output and stop on first failure

session.assistant:
pytest failed: 1 test failed
**Summary:** - 28 tests passed - 1 test failed
**Failure Details:**
| Test | File | Error | |------|------|-------| | `test_learn_remote_dispatches_workflow` | `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/launch/test_launch_remote_paths.py:238` | CLI option mismatch - test uses `--plan` option but CLI only accepts `--pr`. Error: "No such option: --plan Did you mean --pr?" |
The test is invoking the `launch` command with a `--plan` option that doesn't exist in the current CLI implementation. The CLI suggests the correct option is `--pr` instead of `--plan`.
